testcase.name: TC-HOME-01: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then home page loads with correct URL
TC-HOME-02: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then main feed container is visible
TC-HOME-03: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then page header area is rendered
TC-HOME-04: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then sidebar navigation is present
TC-HOME-05: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then Home link in sidebar is visible
TC-HOME-06: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then feed renders at least one post or content block
TC-HOME-07: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then create-post input or button is visible
TC-HOME-08: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then scrolling down loads more content
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › home\home.spec.js:71:5 › TC-HOME-08: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then scrolling down loads more content
Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThan(expected)
Expected: > 1 Received: 1
77 | await page.waitForTimeout(1500); 78 | const after = await page.locator('main > div > *').count(); > 79 | expect(after).toBeGreaterThan(before); | ^ 80 | }); 81 | 82 | // ── Post Card Anatomy ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-webapp\tests\home\home.spec.js:79:17
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_20-22-27\artifacts\home-home-TC-HOME-08-Given-332b9-ing-down-loads-more-content-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-13_20-22-27\artifacts\home-home-TC-HOME-08-Given-332b9-ing-down-loads-more-content-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-13_20-22-27\artifacts\home-home-TC-HOME-08-Given-332b9-ing-down-loads-more-content-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-HOME-09: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then post card contains an author link or avatar
TC-HOME-10: Given I am on the post card, When I view it, Then it shows post text content
TC-HOME-11: Given I am on the post card, When I view it, Then it shows a timestamp or post-age indicator
TC-HOME-12: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then post card has at least two action buttons
TC-HOME-13: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then post card three-dot options menu is present
TC-HOME-14: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then like button is present on feed posts
TC-HOME-15: Given the page is loaded, When I click like button is interactive and page remains stable, Then it responds correctly
TC-HOME-16: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then comment button is present on feed posts
TC-HOME-17: Given the comment button is present, When I click the comment button, Then it opens comments section or dialog
TC-HOME-18: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then share button is present on feed posts
TC-HOME-19: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then three-dot post menu opens on click
TC-HOME-20: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then post menu contains report or hide option
TC-HOME-21: Given the author name is present, When I click the author name, Then it navigates to their profile
TC-HOME-22: Given the Explore nav link is present, When I click the Explore nav link, Then it navigates to /app/explore
TC-HOME-23: Given the Notifications nav link is present, When I click the Notifications nav link, Then it navigates to /app/notifications
TC-HOME-24: Given the Messages nav link is present, When I click the Messages nav link, Then it navigates to /app/messages
TC-HOME-25: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then top navigation area contains visible nav items
TC-HOME-26: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then sidebar has multiple navigation links
TC-HOME-27: Given the create-post is present, When I click the create-post, Then it trigger expands the composer
TC-HOME-28: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then composer dialog contains a text input area
TC-HOME-29: Given I am on the composer, When I view it, Then it shows the logged-in user avatar or name
TC-HOME-30: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then composer Post button is disabled when text area is empty
TC-HOME-31: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then typing in composer enables the Post button
TC-HOME-32: Given I am on the page, When I interact with the element, Then composer can be dismissed with Escape or close button
TC-HOME-33: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then composer has a media/photo attachment option
TC-HOME-34: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then stories or highlights bar is present if feature is enabled
TC-HOME-35: Given the story is present, When I click the story, Then it opens the story viewer
TC-HOME-36: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then feed filter or sort control is accessible if present
TC-HOME-37: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then image posts render their media correctly
TC-HOME-38: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then page title reflects the app name
TC-HOME-39: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then page has no uncaught JS errors on load
TC-HOME-40: Given I am on the page, When I reload the page, Then content remains intact
TC-HOME-41: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then create post widget text input is visible
TC-HOME-42: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Photo button is present in the create post widget
TC-HOME-43: Given the Photo button is present, When I click the Photo button, Then it opens the photo picker or upload dialog
TC-HOME-44: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Video button is present in the create post widget
TC-HOME-45: Given the page is loaded, When I click Video button is interactive and page stays stable, Then it responds correctly
TC-HOME-46: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Studio button is present in the create post widget
TC-HOME-47: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Studio button is clickable and page stays stable
TC-HOME-48: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Live button or link is present in the create post widget
TC-HOME-49: Given the Live button is present, When I click the Live button, Then it navigates to or opens the live stream setup
TC-HOME-50: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Feeling button is present in the create post widget
TC-HOME-51: Given the Feeling button is present, When I click the Feeling button, Then it opens the emotion or emoji picker
TC-HOME-52: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then Post button is visible
TC-HOME-53: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then Post button is disabled when no text is entered
TC-HOME-54: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then Post button has a dropdown chevron for post type selection
TC-HOME-55: Given I am on the create post widget, When I view it, Then it shows the logged-in user avatar
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-01: comment section opens after clicking comment button
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-02: comment input field is visible and editable
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-03: typing in comment input reflects the text
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-04: comment submit button enables when text is entered
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-05: submitting a comment clears the input
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-06: submitted comment appears in the comment thread
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-07: existing comments are visible in the comment section
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-08: comment section shows comment count
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-09: reply button is present on individual comments
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-10: clicking Reply on a comment opens a reply input
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-11: own comment has a delete option
Comment Flow › TC-INTERACT-COMMENT-12: click like on comment, verify like state toggled (aria-pressed changed, count changed, or class changed)
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-01: hovering the like button reveals a reaction picker
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-02: reaction picker contains multiple distinct reaction options
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-03: clicking a reaction registers it and updates button state
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-04: click reaction count, verify a reactions list/modal opens showing who reacted
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-05: clicking reaction count opens the reactions list viewer
Reaction Picker › TC-INTERACT-REACT-06: clicking the active reaction again removes it (toggle)
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-01: clicking on post content navigates to post detail page
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-02: post detail page shows the post content
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-03: post detail page has a comment section
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-04: post detail page shows like and share buttons
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-05: post detail shows the author's name and avatar
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-06: back navigation from detail returns to home feed
Post Detail View › TC-INTERACT-DETAIL-07: post timestamp is shown on the detail page
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-01: click share button, verify share dialog/sheet/menu opens (contains share options)
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-02: clicking share opens a share options panel or dialog
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-03: share panel contains a copy link option
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-04: share panel has a repost or share to feed option
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-05: share panel can be dismissed with Escape
Share Flow › TC-INTERACT-SHARE-06: share panel has a send via message option

See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-01: click See More, verify text expanded (element height increased or truncation removed — check that a "See Less" button appears or text length increased)
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-02: clicking "See more" expands the full post text
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-03: expanded post shows a "See less" button
See More — Long Post Truncation › TC-INTERACT-SEERMORE-04: clicking "See less" re-truncates the post
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-01: click save/bookmark button, verify state changed (aria-pressed, icon class, or toast appeared)
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-02: clicking bookmark saves the post and updates button state
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-03: bookmark button in post 3-dot menu is accessible
Bookmark / Save Post › TC-INTERACT-SAVE-04: saved posts are accessible from profile or saved section
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-01: feed tabs are visible if present (For You / Following / Latest)
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-02: active tab is visually distinguished
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-03: clicking an inactive tab switches feed content
Feed Tabs › TC-INTERACT-TABS-04: switching tabs does not break the page or throw errors
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-01: hashtags in posts are rendered as clickable links
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-02: clicking a hashtag navigates to the hashtag or explore page
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-03: @mentions in posts are rendered as clickable profile links
Hashtags and Mentions › TC-INTERACT-TAG-04: clicking an @mention navigates to that user's profile
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-01: scrolling to bottom triggers a loading indicator
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-02: more posts load after scrolling to bottom
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-03: page does not crash during repeated scrolling
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-04: back-to-top button appears after scrolling down
Infinite Scroll and Loading State › TC-INTERACT-SCROLL-05: feed items are not duplicated after pagination
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-01: composer opens with a text input area
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-02: Post button is disabled when composer is empty
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-03: typing text enables the Post button
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-04: composer shows logged-in user avatar
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-05: composer can be dismissed with Escape key
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-06: composer can be dismissed with close button
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-07: clearing text after typing disables Post button again
Text Post › TC-POST-TEXT-08: composer has emoji or attachment toolbar
Photo Post › TC-POST-PHOTO-01: Given the home page is loaded, when the Photo button is clicked, then a file picker dialog or composer opens
Photo Post › TC-POST-PHOTO-02: clicking Photo button opens the composer or file picker
Photo Post › TC-POST-PHOTO-03: photo composer has an upload area or file input
Photo Post › TC-POST-PHOTO-04: photo composer has a caption/text input
Photo Post › TC-POST-PHOTO-05: photo composer Post button is present
Photo Post › TC-POST-PHOTO-06: photo composer can be dismissed
Video Post › TC-POST-VIDEO-01: Given the home page is loaded, when the Video button is clicked, then a video composer or dialog opens
Video Post › TC-POST-VIDEO-02: clicking Video button opens a composer or upload area
Video Post › TC-POST-VIDEO-03: video upload area or file input is accessible
Video Post › TC-POST-VIDEO-04: video composer can be dismissed
Feeling Post › TC-POST-FEELING-01: Given the home page is loaded, when the Feeling button is clicked, then an emotion picker opens containing selectable items
Feeling Post › TC-POST-FEELING-02: Given the Feeling button is clicked, when the picker opens, then it contains clickable options with count greater than zero
Feeling Post › TC-POST-FEELING-03: emotion picker contains selectable options
Feeling Post › TC-POST-FEELING-04: selecting a feeling adds it to the composer
Feeling Post › TC-POST-FEELING-05: feeling picker can be dismissed with Escape
Feeling Post › TC-POST-FEELING-06: feeling picker has a search or filter input
Studio Post › TC-POST-STUDIO-01: Given the home page is loaded, when the Studio button is clicked, then a dropdown menu opens or the page navigates to a Studio URL
Studio Post › TC-POST-STUDIO-02: Given the Studio dropdown opens, when its contents are inspected, then it contains at least one option with visible text
Studio Post › TC-POST-STUDIO-03: Studio dropdown shows sub-option items
Studio Post › TC-POST-STUDIO-04: selecting a Studio sub-option opens the correct composer
Studio Post › TC-POST-STUDIO-05: Studio interaction does not crash the app
Live Streaming › TC-POST-LIVE-01: Given the home page is loaded, when the Live button is clicked, then the page navigates to a live setup URL or a live dialog opens
Live Streaming › TC-POST-LIVE-02: clicking Live navigates to the live setup page
Live Streaming › TC-POST-LIVE-03: live setup page has a title or go-live button
Live Streaming › TC-POST-LIVE-04: live setup page has a title input for the stream
Post Privacy › TC-POST-PRIVACY-01: privacy selector is present in the composer
Post Privacy › TC-POST-PRIVACY-02: clicking privacy selector opens audience options
Post Privacy › TC-POST-PRIVACY-03: Public option is available in audience selector
Post Privacy › TC-POST-PRIVACY-04: Friends option is available in audience selector
Post Privacy › TC-POST-PRIVACY-05: selecting a privacy option updates the selector label
File Upload › TC-POST-UPLOAD-01: clicking Photo opens a composer or file input
File Upload › TC-POST-UPLOAD-02: can attach a test image via file input
File Upload › TC-POST-UPLOAD-03: image attachment enables the Post button
File Upload › TC-POST-UPLOAD-04: can attach a test video via file input
File Upload › TC-POST-UPLOAD-05: image preview or thumbnail appears after file selection
Text Post Submission & Cleanup › TC-POST-SUBMIT-01: can write and submit a text post (dialog closes on submit)
Text Post Submission & Cleanup › TC-POST-SUBMIT-02: submitted post appears in the feed
Text Post Submission & Cleanup › TC-POST-SUBMIT-03: full create → delete cycle removes the post from feed
Stories Bar › TC-STORY-BAR-01: stories bar or carousel is present on home feed
Stories Bar › TC-STORY-BAR-02: stories bar contains at least one story item
Stories Bar › TC-STORY-BAR-03: Add Story button is present in the stories bar
Stories Bar › TC-STORY-BAR-04: story items show user avatars or thumbnails
Stories Bar › TC-STORY-BAR-05: stories bar can be scrolled horizontally if overflowing
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-01: clicking a story opens the story viewer
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-02: story viewer shows the story content (image or video)
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-03: story viewer has a progress bar showing duration
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-04: story viewer shows the author name or avatar
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-05: story viewer has a close button
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-06: pressing Escape closes the story viewer
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-07: clicking close button dismisses the story viewer
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-08: next story navigation button is present
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-09: previous story navigation button is present
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-10: clicking next advances to the next story
Viewing Stories › TC-STORY-VIEW-11: story viewer shows timestamp of when story was posted
Story Reactions and Replies › TC-STORY-REACT-01: reaction or emoji bar is visible in story viewer
Story Reactions and Replies › TC-STORY-REACT-02: reply input field is present in story viewer
Story Reactions and Replies › TC-STORY-REACT-03: typing a reply enables the send button
Story Reactions and Replies › TC-STORY-REACT-04: clicking a reaction emoji on a story is interactive
Creating a Story › TC-STORY-CREATE-01: Add Story button is clickable
Creating a Story › TC-STORY-CREATE-02: clicking Add Story opens the story creator
Creating a Story › TC-STORY-CREATE-03: story creator has a photo upload option
Creating a Story › TC-STORY-CREATE-04: story creator has a text story option
Creating a Story › TC-STORY-CREATE-05: story creator has a video option
Creating a Story › TC-STORY-CREATE-06: story creator can be dismissed without creating
My Story Management › TC-STORY-MY-01: own story item is present if user has an active story
My Story Management › TC-STORY-MY-02: own story shows view count when opened
My Story Management › TC-STORY-MY-03: own story has a delete option
My Story Management › TC-STORY-MY-04: story shows 24h expiry indicator
